name: expedia-travel-mcp
title: Expedia Travel Recommendations
description: Official Expedia MCP server for travel recommendations — search hotels, flights, activities, and car rentals via Expedia's platform.
tagline: Expedia-powered travel search for hotels, flights, activities, and cars
author: ExpediaGroup
contract_notes: Community-contributed listing of ExpediaGroup's official open-source MCP. Implements travel search (no booking). Complements sabre-blade-mcp for read-only travel exploration without GDS credentials.

highlights.text: Hotels — search Expedia's inventory with real-time availability
Flights — search across Expedia's airline partners
Activities — discover tours, attractions, and experiences
Cars — rental car search across multiple providers

readme:
### What it does

Expedia Travel Recommendations provides travel search tools powered by Expedia's inventory. Search hotels, flights, activities, and rental cars without needing GDS credentials.

### How it compares to sabre-blade-mcp

| | Expedia MCP | sabre-blade-mcp |
|---|---|---|
| **Source** | Expedia (official) | groupthink-dev |
| **Scope** | Search/recommendations only | Full workflow: search, price, book, manage |
| **Credentials** | Expedia affiliate key | Sabre GDS credentials (PCC + OAuth) |
| **Booking** | No | Yes (write-gated) |
| **Coverage** | Expedia inventory | 420+ airlines, 2M+ hotels via GDS |

Use Expedia for casual travel exploration. Use Sabre for professional travel management and booking.

setup.blurb: Search Expedia's travel inventory — hotels, flights, activities, and cars. No credentials required for basic search.
setup.help_text: Install and run with npx. No API keys required for basic recommendations.

scenarios.label: Explore vacation destinations
scenarios.body: Search for hotels in Bali for a week-long trip, find popular activities and tours nearby, and compare flight options from your departure city.

notes: Community listing of ExpediaGroup's official open-source MCP. Read-only travel search — no booking capability. Complementary to sabre-blade-mcp.
